#corresponds to a SNP.  Column one provides the SNP identifier (rsID where
#possible).  Columns two and three contain the chromosome and basepair position
#of the SNP using human reference build 37 (GRCh37/hg19).  Columns four and
#five contain the two alleles observed at this SNP (separated by a TAB).
#The genotype is reported on the forward (+) strand with respect to the human
#reference.
